---
title: "\'Disobedient Cecil\'"
---

## \'Disobedient Cecil\'

**Author:** Elizabeth Anna Hart
**Date:** 1874-1876
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1874-June 1876)

### Notes

This serial story does not seem to have been published separately.  The attribution to Hart does not rest solely on the letter;  it is described as by the author of <i>Mrs Jerningham\'s Journal</i>.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
